    # Co-first authors; * Co-corresponding authors

    2021

    • Li, Z.#, Kuppe, C.#, Ziegler, S., Cheng, M., Kabgani, N., Menzel, S., Zenke, M., Kramann, R.* and Costa, I.G.*, 2021. Chromatin-accessibility estimation of single-cell ATAC data with scOpen. bioRxiv.

    2020

    • Kuppe, C.#, Flores, R.O.R.#, Li, Z.#, Hannani, M., Tanevski, J., Halder, M., Cheng, M., Ziegler, S., Zhang, X., Preisker, F., Kaesler, N., Xu, Y., Hoogenboezem, R.M., Bindels, E., Schneider, R.K., Milting, H., Costa, I.G.*, Saez-Rodriguez, J.* and Kramann, R.*, 2020. Spatial multi-omic map of human myocardial infarction. bioRxiv.

    2019

    • Li, Z., Schulz, M.H., Look, T., Begemann, M., Zenke, M. and Costa, I.G., 2019. Identification of transcription factor binding sites using ATAC-seq. Genome biology, 20(1), pp.1-21.
    • Guo, J., Li, Z. and Yang, S., 2019. Accelerating differential evolution based on a subset-to-subset survivor selection operator. Soft Computing, 23(12), pp.4113-4130.

    2018

    • GUO, J., XIE, W. and Li, Z., 2018. Enhancing JADE utilizing distance of best solutions. Computer Engineering and Design, p.01.

    2016

    • Li, Z., Guo, J. and Yang, S., 2016. Improving the JADE algorithm by clustering successful parameters. International Journal of Wireless and Mobile Computing, 11(3), pp.190-197.

    2015

    • Guo, J., Li, Z., Xie, W. and Wang, H., 2015. Dissipative differential evolution with self-adaptive control parameters. In 2015 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) (pp. 3088-3095). IEEE.
